title: Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey | Helen Grant
headings: h2: Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey
h3: Helen Grant Conservative Candidate for Maidstone and Malling
text_excerpt: Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey | Helen Grant Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Helen News Advice Surgeries My Plan In Parliament Contact Cost of Living Help Hub Apprenticeship Portal Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey Tweet Dear constituent, When you or someone in your family is ill, you want to be able to see your local GP and get the help you need. An excellent GP practice does much more than write prescriptions and make referrals – it looks after you physically and mentally, helps you manage if you have a long-term condition and cares for the community. Unfortunately, people often tell me that it’s difficult to get an appointment. That’s why I’m getting in touch to find out more about your experiences at your local surgery. Please fill out this survey and return it to me so I can help you get better healthcare. Best wishes, Helen Maidstone & Malling GP Surgery Survey Current Your details GP Survey Leave this field blank First name Last name Email Postcode Address ID Address Parliamentary constituency Admin county Admin district CED Admin ward Parish I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy .
